name: @fairmint/open-captable-protocol-daml-js
description: Open CapTable Protocol DAML smart contracts with generated JavaScript bindings

scripts.codegen: npm run build && cd OpenCapTable-v07 && daml codegen js && cd .. && cd OpenCapTableShared-v01 && daml codegen js && cd .. && cd OpenCapTableReports-v01 && daml codegen js && cd .. && npm run build:ts && tsx scripts/bundle-dependencies.ts && tsx scripts/create-package-index.ts
scripts.upload-dar:ocp: npm run build && ts-node scripts/upload-dar.ts --network devnet && ts-node scripts/upload-dar.ts --network mainnet
scripts.upload-dar:reports: npm run build && ts-node scripts/upload-dar-reports.ts --network devnet && ts-node scripts/upload-dar-reports.ts --network mainnet
scripts.create-factory:ocp: npm run codegen && ts-node scripts/create-ocp-factory.ts --network devnet && ts-node scripts/create-ocp-factory.ts --network mainnet
scripts.create-factory:reports: npm run codegen && ts-node scripts/create-reports-factory.ts --network devnet && ts-node scripts/create-reports-factory.ts --network mainnet
scripts.upload-and-create:ocp: npm run upload-dar:ocp && npm run create-factory:ocp
scripts.upload-and-create:reports: npm run upload-dar:reports && npm run create-factory:reports
scripts.package:manifest: npm run package:prep && npm pack --dry-run --json --ignore-scripts > /tmp/npm-pack.json 2>/dev/null && jq -r '.[0].files[].path' /tmp/npm-pack.json | sort | tsx scripts/collapse-manifest.ts > generated/npm-manifest.txt
scripts.package:prep: npm run codegen && npm run update-version && tsx scripts/bundle-dependencies.ts && tsx scripts/create-package-index.ts && tsx scripts/create-root-index.ts

author: Fairmint
